description: Add the ability to like posts - each post will display a like count and users can click to like a post. This demonstrates a simple full-stack feature across both projects.

tasks.task: Add likes support to the blog service and controller. In src/blog/blog.service.ts, add a 'likes' field (number, default 0) to the Post interface and existing posts array. Add a new method 'likePost(id: number): Post' that increments the like count. In src/blog/blog.controller.ts, add a new endpoint '@Post(':id/like')' that calls blogService.likePost(id) and returns the updated post.

Add like functionality to the UI. In src/components/PostList.tsx, update the Post interface to include 'likes: number'. In src/components/PostDetail.tsx, add a like button that calls 'POST http://localhost:3000/posts/:id/like' and displays the current like count. Use the existing pattern of fetch calls and state updates seen in the handlePostDeleted pattern in App.tsx.

example_backend: GET /posts returns posts with likes field (default 0)
POST /posts/:id/like returns the updated post with new like count
example_frontend: Post detail view displays current like count
Clicking the like button increments the displayed count
Like count persists when navigating away and back to post
UI handles loading state during like request
